productDisplayName: Puma Unisex Winch Brown Beige Floater
description: Look trendy and stay comfortable in these grey Winch floaters from puma. This grey and orange pair can be teamed with cargo shorts and tees for a cool casual look.Upper Synthetic uppers with panel covering feet from forefoot to ankle for durability and protection Elasticated pull loop with toggle strap for snug Fit Logo on the side and behind collar Lightly cushioned lining and fabric covered tongue for better comfort Midsole Cushioned foam footbed with elevated hexagonal pattern for all day comfort and stimulation of the sole Outsole Rubber outsole with lugs and contrast colour panle for superior grip and durability Slightly built up heel counter and toe counter for better protection of the feet Wash careRub surface with a soft, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
